_meta.title: Cognis authoritative data-feed catalog (2026)
_meta.purpose: Real, recent, mostly-keyless feeds for the Cognis security/OSINT/compliance tools. Edge/air-gap deployable: every feed is fetched over HTTPS with a UA, cached to disk, and re-served offline. Defensive / authorized-use intelligence only.

feeds.name: CISA Known Exploited Vulnerabilities
feeds.notes: Actively-exploited CVEs; the highest-priority patch list for gov/enterprise.

feeds.name: FIRST EPSS exploit-probability scores
feeds.notes: Per-CVE probability of exploitation in next 30d; query ?cve=CVE-... or ?limit=N.

feeds.name: OSV.dev vulnerability query
feeds.notes: Package+version -> known vulns across ecosystems (PyPI/npm/Go/Maven/...).

feeds.name: NIST NVD CVE API 2.0
feeds.notes: Authoritative CVE detail; keyless is rate-limited (5 req/30s) — an NVD_API_KEY raises limits.

feeds.name: MITRE ATT&CK Enterprise (STIX 2.1)
feeds.notes: ~53MB; technique/tactic/mitigation graph for ATT&CK enrichment & mapping.

feeds.name: abuse.ch Feodo Tracker C2 IP blocklist
feeds.notes: Active botnet C2 IPs (Emotet/Dridex/etc.) — direct feed for c2detect / egress hunting.

feeds.name: abuse.ch ThreatFox recent IOCs
feeds.notes: Recent IOCs (IP/domain/url/hash) with malware family + confidence.

feeds.name: abuse.ch URLhaus recent malware URLs
feeds.notes: Recently-seen malware-distribution URLs.

feeds.name: abuse.ch SSL/JA3 blacklist
feeds.notes: Malicious TLS cert SHA1 + JA3 fingerprints — pairs with c2detect TLS detection.

feeds.name: NIST SP 800-53 rev5 catalog (OSCAL)
feeds.notes: Authoritative control catalog + FedRAMP/RMF baselines, native OSCAL JSON.

feeds.name: ATT&CK <-> NIST 800-53 control mappings
feeds.notes: CTID Mappings Explorer crosswalk; if the pinned path 404s, browse github.com/center-for-threat-informed-defense/mappings-explorer for the current version dir.

feeds.name: DISA STIG downloads (index)
feeds.notes: STIG/SRG library; each STIG is a zip of XCCDF. HTML index -> scrape links; air-gap: pre-download the zips.

feeds.name: US Treasury OFAC SDN list
feeds.notes: Sanctioned entities/vessels/aircraft — sanctions cross-reference for maritimeint/cryptotrace/chainreserve.

feeds.name: GDELT 2.0 global event stream
feeds.notes: Pointer file -> latest events/mentions/gkg CSV.zip every 15 min; conflict/event OSINT.

feeds.name: OpenSky Network live aircraft states
feeds.notes: Live ADS-B state vectors (anonymous = heavily rate-limited; account raises limits) -> adsbwatch input.

feeds.name: AWS public IP ranges
feeds.notes: Attribute cloud egress/ingress by service+region.

feeds.name: Google Cloud IP ranges
feeds.notes: GCP CIDR -> region/service.

feeds.name: GitHub Security Advisory DB (GHSA)
feeds.notes: Reviewed advisories across ecosystems w/ CVE + CVSS + affected ranges; pairs with osv.

feeds.name: CIRCL CVE / vulnerability-lookup
feeds.notes: Recent CVEs (CIRCL mirror) for quick enrichment without NVD rate limits.

feeds.name: CISA KEV (cisagov GitHub mirror)
feeds.notes: Resilient mirror of cisa-kev for when cisa.gov UA-blocks.

feeds.name: OSV bulk export (PyPI all)
feeds.notes: Whole-ecosystem OSV dump for air-gapped offline vuln matching (swap PyPI for any ecosystem).

feeds.name: Spamhaus DROP (don't-route-or-peer)
feeds.notes: Hijacked/criminal netblocks to block at the perimeter; egress/ingress hygiene.

feeds.name: Tor Project exit-node bulk list
feeds.notes: Current Tor exit IPs — flag anonymized inbound/outbound in logs.

feeds.name: abuse.ch SSLBL JA3 fingerprint blacklist
feeds.notes: Malicious-client JA3 hashes — direct signature input for c2detect TLS matching.

feeds.name: abuse.ch URLhaus recent (full)
feeds.notes: Recently-seen malware-distribution URLs (host/url/payload).

feeds.name: MITRE ATT&CK Mobile (STIX 2.1)
feeds.notes: Mobile technique graph (pairs with apkprobe / mobile suite).

feeds.name: MITRE ATT&CK ICS (STIX 2.1)
feeds.notes: ICS/OT technique graph (pairs with modpot ICS honeypot).

feeds.name: NIST 800-53 rev5 HIGH baseline (OSCAL)
feeds.notes: FedRAMP/RMF High baseline profile.

feeds.name: NIST 800-53 rev5 MODERATE baseline (OSCAL)
feeds.notes: FedRAMP/RMF Moderate baseline profile.

feeds.name: USGS earthquake feed (GeoJSON)
feeds.notes: Global seismic events — natural-hazard situational awareness / facility risk.

feeds.name: NOAA/NWS active weather alerts
feeds.ua_required: set a User-Agent with a contact per weather.gov policy
feeds.notes: US severe-weather alerts (GeoJSON) for ops/force-protection geo-risk overlays.

feeds.name: ReliefWeb (UN OCHA) disasters/reports
feeds.notes: UN humanitarian situational awareness (disasters/reports); v2 endpoint, appname required.

feeds.name: openFDA enforcement / recalls
feeds.notes: Recall/enforcement events — supply-chain & product-safety OSINT.

feeds.name: Wikimedia Commons (LICENSED media search)
feeds.notes: Properly-LICENSED images (CC/PD) with attribution metadata — the lawful source for repo/item imagery (NOT Google scraping). Always carry the license + author from extmetadata.

feeds.name: Azure public IP ranges (service tags)
feeds.notes: Azure service-tag CIDRs (download page -> weekly JSON); attribute Azure egress.
